name: mb-claude-skills
description: Maurice Blackburn's free Claude skills for the marketing team.

plugins.name: mb-marketing
plugins.description: MB brand reference (colours, typography, logo, tone of voice, brand history), a conversational brand-vs-competitor comparison skill, and a full social content toolkit (write, grade, and repurpose MB-branded posts for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and Meta) — on-brand voice, curated hooks, and legal-marketing compliance guardrails built in.

plugins.name: mb-seo
plugins.description: Five skills for a plaintiff law firm's SEO and GEO work: full technical audits, SEO/GEO-optimised page writing with a compliance gate, keyword and AI-citation gap analysis, competitor benchmarking (Share of Voice and Share of Model), and backlink auditing.
